positive: A stylized, retro-futuristic astronaut exploring a bioluminescent forest. The scene features enormous, glowing flora with abstract, geometric patterns in vibrant neon greens, electric blues, and magenta. The astronaut, rendered in a minimalist, clean suit silhouette with exaggerated mechanical details, is reaching out towards a floating, crystalline organism. Composition is central and balanced, emphasizing the contrast between the deep void of space and the vibrant, organic forest light. Studio quality, graphic novel aesthetic, vector art, high contrast, flat colors with subtle gradients, perfect for a t-shirt print, isolated on a clean white background with only the central artwork visible. Cinematic volumetric lighting, sharp focus, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blur, artifact, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, cropped, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise, photographic, realistic photography, messy details, poor composition
